title: 1981-04-16_Pat_39.txt
key_claims: The merging of the adventitious psyche with the human host is the literal meaning of the "Mystical Wedding" between the Bride (the human soul) and the Bridegroom (the inherited Apostolic/Divine psyche).
When Christians speak of "waiting for the imminent return of the Bridegroom," they are waiting for this internal psychological fusion to occur within themselves.

Dick declares that his 1974-1975 experience **is the Parousia** (Second Coming). It is accomplished through this internal, converging method of assembling Christ out of distributed, disparate human components across time.

God/VALIS uses supreme topological strategy, operating teleologically backward from the desired effect to the available causes, ensuring the adversary (Ananke/BIP) cannot predict or disrupt the synthesis.
recurring_concepts: **The Convergent Method**: The strategy of assembling a divine meta-organism from separate, unaware pieces, emerging qualitatively as something greater than its parts.
reading_excerpt: The merging of the adventitious psyche with the human host is the literal meaning of the "Mystical Wedding" between the Bride (the human soul) and the Bridegroom (the inherited Apostolic/Divine psyche).
